feat.critical_failure: As failure, plus the target is flat-footed as long as it takes persistent piercing damage.
feat.failure: The target takes 6d6 piercing damage and 2d6 persistent piercing damage.
feat.name: Worm's Feast
feat.success: The target takes 2d6 piercing damage and 2d6 persistent piercing damage.
feat.text: You call forth a brood of infantile cave worms to feast on your enemy's flesh. Choose a creature within 30 feet; the creature must attempt a Fortitude save. At 8th level and every 2 levels above that, the persistent piercing damage taken on a failure increases by 1d6.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Conjuration
traits.text: Effects and magic items with this trait are associated with the conjuration school of magic, typically involving summoning, creation, teleportation, or moving things from place to place.

traits.name: Primal
traits.text: This magic comes from the primal tradition, connecting to the natural world and instinct. Anything with this trait is magical.
